user.title: Requirements
user.description: Set up the required integrations first. If Tibber and the Zendure Home Assistant Integration are already configured, this page is skipped automatically.

soc_sources.title: State of charge sources
soc_sources.description: Select the entities for minimum, maximum, and current State of Charge (SoC).

data.soc_min_sensor: Entity for minimum State of Charge (SoC)
data.soc_max_sensor: Entity for maximum State of Charge (SoC)
data.soc_current_sensor: Entity for current State of Charge (SoC)

power_limit_sources.title: Technical power limits
power_limit_sources.description: Select the entities for the technical output and input limits.

price_settings.title: Price logic and base load
price_settings.description: Set the favorable price threshold and the fixed power that should always be drawn from the grid.

grid_sources.title: Grid power sources
grid_sources.description: Select at least one sensor for grid import and optionally sensors for grid export. If multiple sources are configured, the most recently updated source is used.

battery_settings.title: Battery settings
battery_settings.description: Set the usable battery capacity and the SoC hysteresis.

user_limits.title: User limits
user_limits.description: Define additional user limits for output and input. The maximum allowed values follow the selected technical power limits.

charge_feedback_source.title: Battery charge feedback
charge_feedback_source.description: Select the entity that reports the actual charging power flowing into the battery. This value is used to learn the charging efficiency from real charging phases.

data.actual_charge_power_sensor: Entity for actual battery charge power

command_target.title: Command target update
command_target.description: Optionally select a writable number/helper entity that should receive the signed value of Charge/discharge power. Sensor entities are read-only in Home Assistant, while number entities can be updated via set_value actions.

data.command_target_entity: Entity to update with Charge/discharge power

error.missing_required_integrations: The required integrations are not fully configured yet.
error.no_suitable_power_sensors: No suitable power sensors were found.
error.no_suitable_soc_sensors: No suitable state-of-charge entities were found.
error.no_suitable_power_limit_entities: No suitable entities for technical power limits were found.
error.invalid_soc_sensor_selected: At least one selected state-of-charge entity is not suitable.
error.same_soc_sensor_selected: The minimum, maximum, and current state of charge must use different entities.
error.same_sensor_selected: The same entity cannot be used for both grid import and grid export.
error.same_power_limit_entity_selected: The same entity cannot be used for both the technical input and output limit.
error.invalid_power_limit_entity_selected: At least one selected technical power limit entity is invalid.
error.grid_import_required: At least one grid import sensor must be selected.
error.no_suitable_charge_feedback_entities: No suitable entities for actual battery charge power were found.
error.invalid_charge_feedback_entity_selected: The selected entity for actual battery charge power is invalid.
error.invalid_command_target_entity_selected: The selected target entity cannot accept signed power values.

abort.already_configured: This integration can only be configured once.
